zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Gressenhall於大約1155年出生在英國時，她的父親William FitzRoger Gressenhall63歲，母親Aeliva21歲。她於1170年與Osmund de Stuteville在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格雷哈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1209年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Gressenhall于大约1155年出生在英国时，她的父亲William FitzRoger Gressenhall63岁，母亲Aeliva21岁。她于1170年与Osmund de Stuteville在英国英格兰諾福爾可格雷哈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1209年在她的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Gressenhall was born about 1155, in England, her father, William FitzRoger Gressenhall, was 63 and her mother, Aeliva, was 21. She married Osmund de Stuteville in 1170, in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1209, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Gressenhall est née environ 1155, à Angleterre, son père, William FitzRoger Gressenhall, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Aeliva, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Osmund de Stuteville en 1170, à Gressenhall, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1209, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Gressenhall um 1155 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzRoger Gressenhall 63 und ihre Mutter Aeliva 21. Sie hat 1170 in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Osmund de Stuteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1209 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Gressenhall è nata il circa 1155 nel England, sua padre, William FitzRoger Gressenhall, aveva 63 anni e sua madre, Aeliva, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Osmund de Stuteville nel 1170, nel Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1209, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Gressenhallが約1155年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William FitzRoger Gressenhallは63歳，母Aelivaは21歳であった。1170年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレセンハルでOsmund de Stutevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1209年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Gressenhall(이)가 대략 1155년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzRoger Gressenhall(은)는 63세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aeliva(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그레센홀에서 Osmund de Stuteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1209년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Gressenhall nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzRoger Gressenhall, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Aeliva, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Osmund de Stuteville em 1170, em Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1209, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Gressenhall родилась около 1155 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzRoger Gressenhall было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Aeliva, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Osmund de Stuteville в 1170 г. в местности грессенолл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1209 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Gressenhall nació aproximadamente 1155, en Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzRoger Gressenhall, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Aeliva, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Osmund de Stuteville en 1170, en Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1209, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
